tasks.title: Analyze CSS for Visual Bugs in src/styles and Component Styles
tasks.description: Perform a thorough review of all CSS files and inline styles in src/styles and component directories to identify visual bugs such as layout issues, incorrect colors, spacing, and responsiveness problems. Document all found CSS bugs with file names and line numbers.
acceptanceCriteria: All CSS files and inline styles have been reviewed
A comprehensive list of CSS bugs with locations is documented
tasks.expectedResult: A detailed report of all CSS bugs found in the project with exact file paths and line references

outputPlan.description: Report listing all identified CSS bugs with file and line references

metadata.inputContext: Project source code including CSS and component styles
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a clear list of CSS bugs to fix in subsequent tasks

tasks.title: Analyze Code and Logic Bugs in src Directory
tasks.description: Perform static and manual code review of all TypeScript and JavaScript files in src directory to identify bugs in code and logic, including incorrect function behavior, state management issues, and runtime errors. Document all found bugs with file names, function names, and line numbers.
acceptanceCriteria: All source code files have been reviewed for logic and code bugs
A comprehensive list of code and logic bugs with locations is documented
tasks.expectedResult: A detailed report of all code and logic bugs found in the project with exact file paths, function names, and line references

outputPlan.description: Report listing all identified code and logic bugs with file, function, and line references

metadata.inputContext: Project source code including all TypeScript and JavaScript files
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a clear list of code and logic bugs to fix in subsequent tasks

tasks.title: Fix All Identified CSS Bugs
tasks.description: Apply targeted fixes to all CSS bugs documented in .flowtask/reports/css-bug-report.md. Modify CSS files and inline styles to correct layout, color, spacing, and responsiveness issues. Follow existing project style conventions and test visual correctness locally.
acceptanceCriteria: All CSS bugs from the report are fixed
Visual appearance matches design expectations without regressions
tasks.expectedResult: CSS files and inline styles are corrected with no visual bugs remaining as per the report

outputPlan.description: Fixed CSS files with corrected styles

metadata.inputContext: CSS bug report from previous analysis
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Removes all CSS bugs to improve UI correctness

tasks.title: Fix All Identified Code and Logic Bugs
tasks.description: Apply targeted fixes to all code and logic bugs documented in .flowtask/reports/code-logic-bug-report.md. Modify TypeScript and JavaScript source files to correct function behavior, state management, and runtime errors. Follow existing project coding style and conventions.
acceptanceCriteria: All code and logic bugs from the report are fixed
Code passes linting and all tests pass without errors
tasks.expectedResult: Source code files are corrected with no code or logic bugs remaining as per the report

outputPlan.description: Fixed TypeScript source files with corrected logic
Fixed TSX source files with corrected logic

metadata.inputContext: Code and logic bug report from previous analysis
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Removes all code and logic bugs to improve application correctness

tasks.title: Run Full Self-Test Suite to Verify Bug Fixes
tasks.description: Execute the full test suite using pnpm test to verify that all bug fixes for CSS, code, and logic are effective and no regressions exist. Confirm all tests pass successfully.
acceptanceCriteria: All tests pass with exit code 0
No new test failures or errors occur
tasks.expectedResult: Test suite completes successfully with all tests passing, confirming bug fixes

metadata.inputContext: Bug fixes applied to CSS and source code
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Confirms that all fixes are effective and the project is stable
